title: Sub-Item "Duplication/Mirroring" within Same Board
excerpt: In the same board, I have items that are “connected” to other items (the “other items” are in the same board). I want any subitems that are created to be “duplicated” onto any other item(s) that the parent item is connec…

posts.author: ChangingTheStatistic (Riley Feldman)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the same board, I have items that are “connected” to other items (the “other items” are in the same board). I want any subitems that are created to be “duplicated” onto any other item(s) that the parent item is connected to. And if that sub item is changed, that change is reflected in the subitems on the connected items.

In summary - I want all items that are connected to each other on the same board to have the EXACT same subitems.

How can I accomplish this?

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Riley,

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems.

We don’t support this exact use case but we’re always adding new capabilities to it.
Can you reach out to me via email so I can understand better what you’re aiming for and we’ll see if we can add something to support that?

I’m available at daniel@fantasymedia.io
